title: erythroxylum coca
intro: Erythroxylum coca is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, primarily used for its leaves which contain the stimulant alkaloids cocaine and tropacocaine. The medicinal properties of the Erythroxylum coca plant include its ability to increase alertness, boost energy, and alleviate symptoms of altitude sickness. The health benefits associated with the plant include improved mental focus, increased oxygenation of the body, and enhanced physical endurance. Erythroxylum coca leaves are often prepared as a tea or infused into herbal remedies, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, fatigue, and respiratory issues.
